title: jasminum calcicola
intro: Jasminum calcicola, also known as the calcicole jasmine, is a species of flowering plant in the family Oleaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to exhibit antioxidant and anti-inflammatory activities. The health benefits of Jasminum calcicola include its potential to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and provide relief from digestive issues. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
